calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Golden Tiger, LLC., a California limited liability company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Cuong Q. La, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Phyllis Trammell and Louis Williams
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Photo---------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4 - Photo---------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 155 Hyde St., #505, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $506.56
Attorney's Fees $180.00
Waived Costs, for a Total of $686.56
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL SHERWOOD ROSSOFF ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF GOLDEN TIGER LLC
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PHYLLIS TRAMMELL

THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF THE D-218 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR THIS DATE; TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:SHERIFE HUSENY; NOT REPORTED (218)
